description: Market and macro proxies used by regime inference and cross-asset context layers.

instruments.reason_for_inclusion: Useful macro or cross-asset proxy for regime inference and risk-on/risk-off classification.
instruments.notes: Track trend, volatility, and cross-asset divergence to inform regime engine posture.
